title: Sweet Ethiopian Wot Stew
description: A flavorful vegan stew inspired by traditional Ethiopian cuisine, made with sweet potatoes and beans.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onions and cook until softened.
Add the chickpeas and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the sweet potatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the Ethiopian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beans and vegetable broth. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with injera.
